name: Regular Checkup
description: Visit a doctor for a routine examination. Can detect conditions with mild symptoms.
logMessage: You go to the doctor and they run some routine tests.
logMessageWhenAllClear: You go to the doctor and they run some routine tests. Everything seems to be fine.
logMessageWhenDiagnosed: You go to the doctor and they run some routine tests. Something was found that needs attention.
logMessageWhenTreated: You go to the doctor and they run some routine tests. Treatment has been started for your condition.

name: Deep Tests
description: Comprehensive medical tests to diagnose any underlying condition.
logMessage: You undergo comprehensive medical tests at the clinic.
logMessageWhenAllClear: You undergo comprehensive medical tests at the clinic. The results come back and everything looks normal.
logMessageWhenDiagnosed: You undergo comprehensive medical tests at the clinic. The results reveal something that needs further follow-up.
logMessageWhenTreated: You undergo comprehensive medical tests at the clinic. Treatment has been started for your condition.

name: Go to ER
description: Emergency room visit for acute conditions. High cost but can treat urgent issues.
logMessage: You go to the emergency room for urgent care.
logMessageWhenAllClear: You go to the emergency room for urgent care. The staff assess you and everything stabilizes.
logMessageWhenDiagnosed: You go to the emergency room for urgent care. Something was found that needs attention.
logMessageWhenTreated: You go to the emergency room for urgent care. The staff provide immediate treatment for your condition.

name: Go to Therapy
description: Regular therapy sessions to work through mental health challenges.
logMessage: You attend a therapy session and talk through things with someone who listens.
logMessageWhenAllClear: You attend a therapy session and talk through things with someone who listens. It feels good to be heard.
logMessageWhenDiagnosed: You attend a therapy session and talk through things with someone who listens. Your therapist helps you understand what you have been experiencing.
logMessageWhenTreated: You attend a therapy session and talk through things with someone who listens. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: Asthma Management Plan
description: Work with a specialist to create an asthma management plan with inhalers and triggers to avoid.
logMessage: You meet with a specialist to create an asthma management plan with inhalers and triggers to avoid.
logMessageWhenTreated: You meet with a specialist to create an asthma management plan with inhalers and triggers to avoid. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: Diabetes Management
description: Get insulin therapy and blood sugar monitoring guidance from an endocrinologist.
logMessage: You work with an endocrinologist on insulin therapy and blood sugar monitoring.
logMessageWhenTreated: You work with an endocrinologist on insulin therapy and blood sugar monitoring. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: Cancer Treatment
description: Undergo chemotherapy, radiation, or surgery to treat cancer.
logMessage: You begin cancer treatment. It is a difficult journey, but you are taking the steps to fight it.
logMessageWhenTreated: You begin cancer treatment. It is a difficult journey, but you are taking the steps to fight it. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: Fracture Care
description: Receive proper casting and follow-up care for a broken bone.
logMessage: You receive proper casting and follow-up care for your fracture.
logMessageWhenTreated: You receive proper casting and follow-up care for your fracture. The healing process begins.

name: Psychiatric Consultation
description: Consult a psychiatrist for diagnosis and treatment of mental health conditions.
logMessage: You meet with a psychiatrist for evaluation and treatment options.
logMessageWhenAllClear: You meet with a psychiatrist for evaluation. They discuss your options and you leave with a clearer picture.
logMessageWhenDiagnosed: You meet with a psychiatrist for evaluation. They provide a diagnosis and recommend a treatment plan.
logMessageWhenTreated: You meet with a psychiatrist for evaluation and treatment options. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: Join Support Group
description: Connect with others facing similar challenges. Shared experiences can help.
logMessage: You join a support group and connect with others who understand. Sharing experiences brings relief.
logMessageWhenTreated: You join a support group and connect with others who understand. Sharing experiences brings relief. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: Take Extra Vitamins
description: Supplement your diet with vitamins to support overall health.
logMessage: You add vitamins to your daily routine. Your body feels a little stronger.

name: Meditate
description: Practice mindfulness and breathing exercises to reduce stress.
logMessage: You take time to meditate and practice breathing exercises. Your mind feels calmer.
logMessageWhenTreated: You take time to meditate and practice breathing exercises. Your mind feels calmer. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: Yoga Class
description: Attend a yoga class for physical flexibility and mental calm.
logMessage: You attend a yoga class. Your body feels more flexible and your mind more at peace.
logMessageWhenTreated: You attend a yoga class. Your body feels more flexible and your mind more at peace. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: Nature Walks
description: Spend time outdoors walking in nature to clear your mind.
logMessage: You spend time walking in nature. The fresh air and quiet help clear your head.
logMessageWhenTreated: You spend time walking in nature. The fresh air and quiet help clear your head. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: Digital Detox
description: Take a break from screens and social media to reduce stress.
logMessage: You take a break from screens and social media. The mental space feels refreshing.
logMessageWhenTreated: You take a break from screens and social media. The mental space feels refreshing. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: Journaling
description: Write down your thoughts and feelings to process emotions.
logMessage: You spend time journaling, writing down your thoughts and feelings. It helps process what has been going on.
logMessageWhenTreated: You spend time journaling, writing down your thoughts and feelings. It helps process what has been going on. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: Sleep Hygiene Program
description: Establish better sleep habits for improved rest and recovery.
logMessage: You establish better sleep habits. You wake up feeling more rested.
logMessageWhenTreated: You establish better sleep habits. You wake up feeling more rested. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: Healthy Cooking
description: Prepare nutritious meals at home to support your body.
logMessage: You prepare nutritious meals at home. Your body appreciates the nourishment.

name: Get a Pet
description: The companionship of a pet can improve mental well-being.
logMessage: You welcome a pet into your life. The companionship brings comfort and joy.
logMessageWhenTreated: You welcome a pet into your life. The companionship brings comfort and joy. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: Use Inhaler
description: Use your prescribed inhaler to manage asthma symptoms.
logMessage: You use your inhaler as prescribed. Your breathing feels easier.
logMessageWhenTreated: You use your inhaler as prescribed. Your breathing feels easier. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: Blood Sugar Monitoring
description: Carefully monitor and manage your blood sugar levels throughout the day.
logMessage: You carefully monitor your blood sugar levels throughout the day. Keeping track helps you stay on top of things.
logMessageWhenTreated: You carefully monitor your blood sugar levels throughout the day. Keeping track helps you stay on top of things. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: ADHD Routine
description: Establish a structured routine and use strategies to manage ADHD symptoms.
logMessage: You establish a structured routine to manage ADHD. Having a clear plan helps.
logMessageWhenTreated: You establish a structured routine to manage ADHD. Having a clear plan helps. You feel hopeful about the path forward.

name: Diabetes Diet
description: Follow a balanced diet designed for diabetes management.
logMessage: You follow a balanced diet designed for diabetes. You feel more in control of your health.
logMessageWhenTreated: You follow a balanced diet designed for diabetes. You feel more in control of your health. You feel hopeful about the path forward.
